allow:

expect ""password:""
send ""v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc\\r""
expect eof
')

Bash(expect -c '
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 ""pip3 install --break-system-packages aiogram telethon pymorphy2 nltk matplotlib wordcloud numpy emoji python-dotenv""
expect ""password:""
send ""v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc\\r""
expect eof
')

Bash(expect -c '
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 ""mkdir -p /opt/bot_tg && ls -la /opt/""
expect ""password:""
send ""v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc\\r""
expect eof
')

Bash(expect -c '
spawn scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no config.py analyzer.py handlers.py main.py .env kristina_user.session root@144.31.221.168:/opt/bot_tg/
expect ""password:""
send ""v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc\\r""
expect eof
')

Bash(expect -c '
spawn scp -r -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no nlp visualization root@144.31.221.168:/opt/bot_tg/
expect ""password:""

')

Bash(expect -c '
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 ""ls -la /opt/bot_tg/""
expect ""password:""
send ""v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc\\r""
expect eof
')

Bash(expect -c '
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 ""cat > /etc/systemd/system/tg-bot.service << EOF
[Unit]
Description=Telegram Analytics Bot
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/opt/bot_tg
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/bot_tg/main.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=10

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF""
expect ""password:""
send ""v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc\\r""
expect eof
')
Bash(sshpass -p "v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 "systemctl status tg-bot 2>&1 || ps aux | grep python")

Bash(sshpass -p "v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 "cat > /opt/bot_tg/.env << ''EOF''
# Telegram API credentials
API_ID=34404218
API_HASH=26f2cb869a2293037cc21c796750e616

# Bot token from @BotFather
BOT_TOKEN=8570008034:AAGMe7qURc8MpmWZIbbUdsMB9X4QeLNxPDk

# Session name for Telethon client
SESSION_NAME=kristina_user
EOF")
Bash(sshpass -p "v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 "systemctl restart tg-bot && sleep 3 && systemctl status tg-bot --no-pager")
Bash(sshpass -p 'v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 'pip3 install natasha && systemctl restart tg-bot')
Bash(sshpass -p 'v7nx4gI82IlEOTmc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@144.31.221.168 'pip3 install --break-system-packages natasha && systemctl restart tg-bot')
